title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Orgacado Limited
body: "Application number 5319  Applicant Ocado Innovation Limited objected to the name used by Orgacado Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 3 September 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Orgacado Limited is changed to 11206069, Ltd. "
